verdict_summary: Successfully captured non-PII gamma slide generation HAR (155.9 MB) with 6x ai/v2/generation + 9x ai/v2/render-generation entries from ai.api.gamma.app. Outline rendered, slides rendered, success notification confirmed.
notes: Flow: prompt 'Make a presentation about climate change' (NON-PII) → 개요 생성 (Generate Outline) clicked → outline rendered with Korean text (기후 변화: 인류의 생존을 위한 싸움) → 생성 (Generate Slides) clicked → ~30s wait → slides rendered → 'gamma 생성이 완료되었습니다' success notification appeared → '첫 번째 gamma 만들었습니다' achievement popup shown. Final URL: gamma.app/docs/Untitled-4pjqxo0o34sy0x0?mode=doc. Defaults used: 카드 10개 (10 cards), 클래식 (Classic), 기본 (Default), 한국어 (Korean). HAR endpoint counts: 6x ai/v2/generation, 9x ai/v2/render-generation, all on ai.api.gamma.app domain. HAR is gitignored — only this result JSON committed; dev pulls HAR via AnyDesk if needed for Option C forged-success outline schema reverse-engineering.
